deepPlanningLocalRun.tokenClaimStatus: Use this run for reliability evidence only; it does not emit token usage fields.

supported: Some planner runs complete with zero model tokens when structured/deterministic paths can finish the task.
In the checked production sample, zero-token planner records were 17 of 72 completed metric records.
In the checked production sample, nonzero model runs averaged about 33.5k total tokens.
notSupportedYet: A blanket claim that Pack uses X% less energy than all competitors.
A DeepPlanning token-savings percentage, because the local DeepPlanning run did not record token usage.
An energy estimate without a model/provider energy methodology tied to the measured token counts.
claimGuidance.nextBenchmarkNeeded: Run the same DeepPlanning-compatible cases through a chat-only baseline and a Pack structured-context path with token accounting enabled.
